description: Generalist developer responsible for building end-to-end applications, solving business problems with code, and designing systems that scale.

junior.expectations: Focus on writing clean, readable code, learning frameworks, completing discrete tasks, and cooperating with peer code reviews.

mid.expectations: Own whole features from API to UI, design robust database models, review pull requests, and deploy applications to staging environments.

senior.expectations: Design scalable system architectures, lead cross-functional code decisions, mentor junior engineers, and configure cloud topologies.
